untranslatable_reason: Double Top pattern detection requires multi-bar peak identification and neckline level calculation. The allowed indicators do not include explicit pattern recognition for identifying two peaks at equal levels, the valley between them, or the neckline support level. These require custom pattern detection logic beyond simple indicator comparisons. Used pivot points (s1 as neckline proxy, pivot as resistance) as a reasonable approximation, but this does not capture the true pattern mechanics described in the signal.
translation_notes: Signal requires custom pattern detection for double tops which is not expressible with allowed indicators. Entry condition approximated using support level (s1) as proxy for neckline breakout. Exit approximated as reversion to pivot. Stop loss set to 3.0% based on average_decline_pct of 19% suggesting moderate volatility. Target regimes reflect bear market preference (72% success vs 67% in bull). AUTHOR_SILENT fields for stop loss methodology and target price projection could not be translated precisely.
